meta.description: US-based tech companies large enough to run dedicated recruiting + internship programs. Target for LinkedIn outreach to recruiters. Populate each company's 'recruiters' array over time with the recruiter object schema below.
meta.use_case: Connect with recruiters at top US tech companies on LinkedIn to source SWE / AI internship opportunities.

recruiter_object_schema.focus_area: e.g. University Recruiting / SWE Intern / New Grad

company_field_legend.name: Company name
company_field_legend.linkedin_company_url: Company LinkedIn page. Curated entries are hand-verified; bulk entries are auto-derived from the name.
company_field_legend.recruiter_search_url: LinkedIn People-tab link filtered to recruiters at this company (open & harvest profiles)
company_field_legend.id: Unique sequential ID (C0001...) for counting & tracking
company_field_legend.linkedin_url_verified: true = hand-verified slug; false = auto-derived from name (may 404 / hit wrong page — spot-check before trusting)

meta.recruiter_links_note: recruiter_search_url is a name-based LinkedIn People search ('<company> recruiter') that works for every company without needing the exact company page slug — open it to see current recruiters, then paste individual profile URLs into recruiters[]. Each company has a unique 'id' (C0001...) so the list is countable/verifiable. NOTE: the first ~263 entries are curated with HQ/size/company-slug; the bulk entries carry verified real names + working recruiter links, with HQ/slug left blank to enrich.
meta.notes: Partition working file for Agent Delta. Minimum batch size 10 companies. Canonical merged file. Source of truth for UI. Agents edit only their job/recruiter-*.json partition files then run this merge script. Partition working file for Agent Alpha.  Populated initial 26 recruiters across 7 priority-1 companies (NVIDIA, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Meta, OpenAI, Anthropic) via web searches. See RECRUITER_WORKFLOW.md for ongoing process.
meta.ui_directory: recruiter-directory/ (Next.js searchable UI with direct LinkedIn links + CSV export)
meta.population_progress: 8-agent parallel split active (see job/AGENT.md). Delta owns C0472–C0627 (156 companies). Currently 36 populated with 72 recruiters in this file. Work ONLY in your assigned partition file. Minimum batch: at least 10 companies per session.

recruiters.notes: Sr Dir Global TA overseeing early-career/SWE hiring. Best senior contact for strategy or escalations on Xplore internship program.

recruiters.name: Irene Eleftheriou
recruiters.title: Global Talent Acquisition Leader
recruiters.notes: Global TA Leader actively posting about StockX internships and "Kickstart Your Career" program. Strong early talent signal.

recruiters.name: Merna Dawood
recruiters.title: Senior Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Senior Recruiter at StockX. Active TA contact for general and technical roles within the internship/new-grad funnel.

recruiters.name: Samantha Waskow
recruiters.title: Senior Recruiter / Full-Cycle Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Senior Recruiter who built GOAT Group’s internship program from scratch. Strong technical recruiting background. Primary for SWE/tech interns/new grads.

recruiters.name: Kristen Scaringelli
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition Associate
recruiters.notes: TA Associate supporting full-cycle recruiting. Good secondary contact for internship and early-career opportunities at GOAT.

recruiters.name: Trivon Simmons-Krafft
recruiters.title: Early Career Recruiter and Program Manager
recruiters.focus_area: Early Career / University Relations / SWE Co-op & Intern
recruiters.notes: Dedicated Early Career Recruiter & Program Manager at Faire. Handles interns, co-ops, new grads, SWE roles. Top contact for Canadian/US early talent (Waterloo etc. students post successes).

recruiters.name: Amanda Beausoleil
recruiters.title: Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Recruiter at Faire (Toronto). Supports early-career and general TA pipelines.

recruiters.name: Kathryn (Ayre) Parietti
recruiters.title: Principal Recruiter (Finance & Software Engineering)
recruiters.notes: Principal Recruiter focused on Software Engineering. Excellent for SWE intern/new-grad technical roles at Faire.

recruiters.name: Meg (Meghan) Foley
recruiters.title: Recruiting Manager, Early Talent
recruiters.location: New York City Metro / Rutgers alum
recruiters.focus_area: Early Talent / University Recruiting / Intern & New Grad Programs
recruiters.notes: Recruiting Manager leading global early career team at Whatnot. Owns intern/new grad recruitment, university outreach, events. Primary manager contact; actively posts about program.

recruiters.name: Alex Dunton
recruiters.title: Senior Recruiter, Early Talent (University + New Grad)
recruiters.focus_area: Early Talent / University + New Grad / Technical (SWE/AI/Robotics)
recruiters.notes: Sr Recruiter Early Talent with 10+ yrs, strong technical focus (SWE, firmware, AI). Previously at Cruise/Fitbit. Especially strong for SWE/technical early roles. Also posts about open Early Talent recruiter headcount.

recruiters.name: Kim McArthur
recruiters.title: Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Recruiter with prior University Recruiter experience at Hulu (technical/intern hiring from top CS programs). Great for tech/analytics early talent at Whatnot.

recruiters.name: Victoria A. (Victoria Astingo)
recruiters.title: Senior Global Talent Acquisition / Senior TA Engineering
recruiters.focus_area: Global New Graduate Engineering / SWE / ML / Technical Recruiting
recruiters.notes: Senior Global TA Engineering at Mercari. Leads global New Graduate Engineering recruitment (SWE, ML, UX etc. across Mercari Group). Best single contact for engineering new-grad/intern pathways globally. Note: Mercari early-career heavily JP new-grad cycle + India hackathons; US ops thinner on dedicated campus roles.

recruiters.name: Pamela Reichelt
recruiters.title: Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Recruiter at OfferUp actively posting about engineering and software roles (incl. manager-level SWE). No prominent dedicated university/early-career titles found; early-career/intern programs appear limited or handled via general TA. Primary current contact for tech hiring. Use recruiter_search_url for latest team.

recruiters.name: Julien Entresangle (former)
recruiters.title: Former TA/Recruitment Leader at letgo
recruiters.notes: Former TA/Recruitment leader at letgo during hyper-growth (built team, processes). Now Founder at Fledge offering fractional TA for tech startups. Letgo US ops largely merged into OfferUp ~2020; no current dedicated "at Letgo" recruiters identified. Use OfferUp contacts or recruiter_search_url for any remaining marketplace TA. Networking/historical context only.

recruiters.name: Derek Corry
recruiters.title: Technical Recruiter
recruiters.notes: Current Technical Recruiter at Gopuff. Strongest current match for SWE, intern, or new-grad engineering roles. Reach out here first for technical early-career.

recruiters.name: Brynne Ferguson
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition
recruiters.notes: Active TA at Gopuff. Solid secondary contact for early-career or corporate opportunities. Note: dedicated Early Careers/Campus program was more visible 2021-22; many specialists have moved on (e.g. to ServiceNow/Stripe).

recruiters.name: Megan Hardin
recruiters.title: Talent Management Program Manager / Early-Career Champion
recruiters.focus_area: Early Career Programs / Internship Management / Campus Recruiting Ops
recruiters.notes: Manages Shipt summer internship programs, uses RippleMatch for early-talent sourcing, attends career fairs, champions early-career hiring. Multiple interns tag her. Primary early-career contact (Shipt/Target subsidiary).

recruiters.name: Ainsley Schneider
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition Lead – Data Science & Engineering
recruiters.focus_area: Data Science & Engineering Recruiting / SWE / Technical
recruiters.notes: TA Lead for Data Science & Engineering. Excellent targeted contact for SWE/tech internships or new-grad engineering roles at Shipt.

recruiters.name: Ashley Anderson
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition Manager
recruiters.notes: TA Manager explicitly working on early career talent funnels/pipelines. Good for broader early-career and intern program coordination.

recruiters.name: Chad Bowser (former)
recruiters.title: Former Director of Talent Acquisition (2020-2022)
recruiters.notes: Former Director of Talent Acquisition at Boxed (Dec 2020–Nov 2022). Now at Valon. Company (wholesale e-comm/grocery) significantly downsized after 2022-2023 SPAC/public phase; very limited current TA or early-career recruiting presence. Former leads for networking/historical context only. Verify via recruiter_search_url for any remaining staff. Weak signals overall for SWE intern programs.

recruiters.name: Lauren Laferriere (associated)
recruiters.title: Senior Technical Recruiter / HR (associated with Boxed)
recruiters.notes: Senior Technical Recruiter/HR with Boxed association (CIR, LinkedIn Recruiter Expert certs). Activity suggests possible transition to other orgs (e.g. medtech). Include for completeness; confirm current affiliation before outreach. Boxed has minimal public early-career/SWE intern signals post-downsizing.

recruiters.name: Robinne Depante
recruiters.title: Early Career Talent Partner
recruiters.focus_area: Early Career Talent / University Relations / Intern Programs
recruiters.notes: Early Career Talent Partner at Proofpoint. Strong focus on university relations and intern programs. Previously involved in virtual internship initiatives and published on adapting intern programs during COVID.

recruiters.name: Ray Vion Collins
recruiters.title: Manager, Global Early Career & Strategic Talent Programs
recruiters.focus_area: Global Early Career / University Relations / Strategic Talent Programs
recruiters.notes: Manager of Global Early Career & Strategic Talent Programs at Proofpoint. Extensive background in university relations and campus recruiting.

recruiters.name: Arelious Porter
recruiters.title: Early Careers Talent and Programs
recruiters.focus_area: Early Careers Talent & Programs / HR Operations
recruiters.notes: Early Careers Talent and Programs at Proofpoint. Drove significant cohort growth in early career programs across regions.
